root.rep_text: รายงาน - ประวัติวัสดุ
root.sql: SELECT sc_acc_m_expire.material_id, sc_acc_m_expire.description, sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day, sc_acc_m_expire.amount_value, sc_acc_m_expire.balance, sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old FROM sc_acc_m_expire WHERE 1=1 /*sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old between :ai_material1 and :ai_material2*/ /*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old

r_sc_acc_expire_history_nest.sql: SELECT sc_acc_m_expire_histroy.operate_date, sc_acc_m_expire_histroy.shelf_id, ( select shelf_name from sc_acc_m_ucf_shelf_exp where sc_acc_m_ucf_shelf_exp.shelf_id = sc_acc_m_expire_histroy.shelf_id ) as shelf_name , coalesce( ( select user_name from si_security_user where user_id = sc_acc_m_expire_histroy.user_keep ) , sc_acc_m_expire_histroy.user_keep) as user_keep, sc_acc_m_expire_histroy.histroy_remark, sc_acc_m_expire_histroy.seq_no FROM sc_acc_m_expire_histroy WHERE 1=1 and sc_acc_m_expire_histroy.material_id = {0} /*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_m_expire_histroy.operate_date
